prompt: A master tailor's dimly lit workshop, warm amber lamp light. An elderly tailor pins a bespoke suit on one wooden mannequin that has been carved and padded to perfectly match one specific person's exact crooked spine and uneven shoulders. The suit hugs this mannequin perfectly. In the background, three other straight standard mannequins wear copies of the same suit, which bunches, sags, and twists completely wrong on their normal frames. Photorealistic, cinematic, no text, no labels
metaphor: Suit fitted to one mannequin's exact asymmetries fits perfectly there, fails completely on all standard mannequins.
